instruction: Update css/style.css to enforce the strict mobile bento grid layout and add stack chip utility classes as specified in blueprint.md. In the @media (max-width: 600px) block, set .bento-inner to height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; and .bento-grid to height: 85vh; grid-template-rows: repeat(7, 1fr);. Assign specific grid-column and grid-row coordinates for all .bc-* classes (.bc-hero, .bc-now, .bc-qugo, .bc-earlier, .bc-comp, .bc-stack, .bc-contact) to fit the 14-cell grid defined in the blueprint. Also, add the utility classes .bc-chip-cat, .bc-chip-cat-title, and .bc-chip-footer to replace existing inline styles in the stack component.
